mechanism: Fiscal deficits drive Treasury supply ($2T+ annual issuance), which pushes up term premium (80-130bp adjusted), while petrodollar erosion and BOJ normalization reduce price-insensitive demand, amplifying the supply effect on term premium.
regime_dependence: Strengthens as deficits exceed ~4.5% GDP and foreign demand declines. Would attenuate if fiscal consolidation occurred or if new price-insensitive buyers emerged.
